operation.label: Trigger activation
operation.description: Activate a trigger and patch all affected downstream dependencies.

affected_closure.label: A verified countermodel under the same formalization would block the theorem entailment claim.
Do not declare T proved or not entailed until a checked certificate, verified countermodel, or failed lemma obligation is recorded.

changed_decision_meaning: Trigger activation changes T1:trigger; 6 downstream object(s) are in closure, so the current decision rendering must be regenerated.

semantic_patch_operations.effect: Activate a trigger and patch all affected downstream dependencies.
Recompute support, contradiction load, confidence, and failure modes.
Render a new decision view after validation passes.

patch_report.summary: trigger_activation on T1 affects 6 downstream object(s); transition=patch; rendering=affected
next_steps: rerun validation after applying any object edits
record trigger state change in patch history or review log
